channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Texas GOP Attorney General Primary Focuses on Trump Loyalty
item.description: Texas Republicans vote Tuesday on whether state Sen. Mayes Middleton or U.S. Rep. Chip Roy will be the party's nominee for attorney general.

item.title: Oil-Rich Alberta Prepares Vote on Secession from Canada
GOP Senators Oppose Trump's Weaponization Payouts
item.description: Some Republican senators reportedly decline payments from the president's fund, despite their phone records being targeted by the Biden administration.

item.title: Gary Sinise Reveals What Drove Him Out of California and Into His Life's Work
